speaker: speaker1
text: I am sorry to have kept all of you waiting . I was delayed by something urgent .

speaker: speaker2
text: You are not late , Mr . Thomas . There're still 15 minutes to go . Mr . White has just called you .

speaker: speaker2
text: He said there was a traffic jam , but he is coming .

speaker: speaker1
text: He shouldn't drive his car . He should come here by bus .
